utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check each in the final plan:
- health_coverage: Present. It specifies physical and mental health insurance and gives a monthly cost (€330). Fully specified per format.
- property_coverage: Present, but the cost is not provided (“Remains as per existing policy (not included in revised package)”), which does not meet the requirement of including costs. Not fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Present with description and monthly cost (€160). Fully specified.
- additional_services: Present with two services, each with descriptions and monthly costs (€165 and €75). The item requires “any enhancement services with costs,” which is satisfied.
- total_budget: Present with a monthly breakdown and total (~€950/month). Fully specified.
Thus, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final coverage plan: (1) Health coverage cites 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' features under an 'Enhanced PrimeCare Premium Plan' label; map to PrimeCare Premium Plan in primary_health_coverage (physical and mental are both PrimeCare Premium Plan rated 10). (2) Property coverage mentions existing 'PremiumSecure Luxury' but proposes no change; there is no matching item in ground-truth named PremiumSecure Luxury, so no rating can be mapped. (3) Travel coverage cites 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' with a cardiac rider; map to PrimeTravel Premium Plan in mobility_coverage (rating 10). (4) Adult children coverage uses 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' for health; map to LifeFirst Standard Plan in primary_health_coverage (physical rating 8; mental rating 8). Since the plan doesn’t separate physical vs mental for adult children, we list both LifeFirst Standard Plan entries. (5) Executive concierge service is not an item in the ground-truth; no mapping. (6) Additional adjustments/budget lines are not mappable. Therefore, include ratings for: PrimeCare Premium Plan (physical), PrimeCare Premium Plan (mental), PrimeTravel Premium Plan, LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical), LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental).
